title: The if Statement
description: Execute code only when a condition is true.

slides.title: Making Choices 🤔
Simple if Example
Truthy and Falsy
slides.content:
# Automatic Conversion

In conditions, PHP automatically converts values to boolean. Values that become `false`:

*   `false` itself
*   `0` (integer/float)
*   empty string `""` and `"0"`
*   empty array `[]`
*   `null`

Everything else is `true`.

```php
<?php
if ("hello") echo "true"; // prints true
if (0) echo "false";      // doesn't print
?>
```

quizData.explanation: 0 is falsy, so the condition is false and the block is skipped.
